lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.10]Hey-ho, big wave! Surf's up — go go go!
[00:03.48]Hey-ho, big wave! Hang on, here we go!
[00:10.30]Ray is riding, ride along!
[00:12.06]Sing it loud, sing it strong!
[00:13.78]Hey-ho, big wave! Surf's up — go go go!
[00:17.24]Hey-ho, big wave! Hang on, here we go!
[00:24.02]Catch it, ride it, never stop!
[00:25.72]Sea Star surfers — top to bop!
[00:27.50]Hey-ho, big wave! Surf's up — go go go!
[00:30.94]Hey-ho, big wave! Hang on, here we go!
